description: You are a backend engineer at a high-traffic e-commerce platform. The inventory-service project at /home/ga/inventory-service is experiencing data corruption under concurrent load during peak sales events, resulting in negative stock levels, double-booked reservations, and incorrect counters. Identify and resolve all thread-safety violations in the StockCounter, ProductCatalog, InventoryManager, and ReservationService components using appropriate java.util.concurrent primitives. Verify the fixes with JUnit 5 tests using concurrent threads and ensure 'mvn clean test' passes.

metadata.bug_1: StockCounter — plain int fields need AtomicInteger
metadata.bug_3: InventoryManager — HashMap + non-atomic check-then-act in removeStock()
metadata.bug_4: ReservationService — unsynchronized compound operations on two maps
